company: Resonance Health Analysis Services Pty Ltd
intended_use: For the measurement of R2 and iron concentration in the liver from MRI scans. For quantitative measurement of the triglyceride fat fraction in magnetic resonance images of the liver, also known as vol
intended_use_full: For the measurement of R2 and iron concentration in the liver from MRI scans. For quantitative measurement of the triglyceride fat fraction in magnetic resonance images of the liver, also known as volumetric liver fat fraction (VLFF).
target_condition: systemic iron overload, transfusion-dependent thalassemia, sickle cell disease, non-transfusion-dependent thalassemia receiving Deferasirox therapy, fatty liver disease
